entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in December 2024, offering spot and derivatives trading through the Bitbaby platform while serving an international user base.
entity.notes: CoinGecko and CoinMarketCap identify a December 2024 launch and United Arab Emirates registration. HEI did not find a clearly named operating legal entity on the reviewed official surfaces, so the origin remains medium-confidence and should be upgraded only with direct company or regulatory documentation.

events.title: Bitbaby Exchange launched
events.description: Bitbaby began operating as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange in December 2024, with spot, derivatives, and copy-trading products described by exchange directories and the live official platform.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish December 2024 but not a precise day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Bitbaby official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitbaby identity and active exchange interface.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange profile for Bitbaby
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile identifies a 2024 establishment year, December 2024 launch, and United Arab Emirates registration.

evidence.title: CoinMarketCap exchange profile for Bitbaby
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the December 2024 launch and United Arab Emirates headquarters claim.
